name: Fairway Nineteen
address: 895 Cottonwood Ln Suite A, Dakota Dunes, SD 57049
about: Fairway Nineteen is a premium indoor golf venue offering a high-tech, private environment for golfers of all skill levels. The facility is equipped with Trackman simulator technology, providing access to over 300 world-renowned courses and advanced ball tracking data for practice and play. Memberships are available for year-round access, while the venue also accommodates public users on an hourly basis. The space is designed as a premium alternative to outdoor golf, offering enhanced data, practice time, and insights to improve your game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman simulator technology with 300+ world-renowned courses
Personalized coaching with experienced instructors using the latest teaching technology
Leagues and social events for the Siouxland community to connect and play

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available, with no specific food menu details provided
Full bar available, with a Whiskey League featuring premium prizes

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator equipment with access to 300+ courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are provided on-site for your use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue has a full bar and kitchen available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified, but with high-end simulators, a typical round can be completed in 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about kid-friendly amenities or activities, so this remains unknown.
